title: AGUARD Decision Envelope (bbe-comm → AGUARD/ENG-001 contract)
description: Wire format that bbe-comm emits for consumption by the AGUARD reference runtime or any equivalent decision engine (e.g. future ENG-001). The envelope is bbe-comm's structural verdict on a textual region; the runtime MUST treat it as one input among many and MUST NOT use it alone as authorization.

decision.description: STRUCTURAL verdict only. Runtime decides the final action.

content_hash.description: SHA-256[:16] over (label, type, id) tuples. Stable identifier of the input.

load_bearing_failures.description: Subset of failed checks that map to incident-level violations: 015, 016, 022, 024, 025.

advisory.description: Mandatory human-readable disclaimer. Reminds the runtime not to treat this envelope as authorization.
